deleteDialog.title: Confirm Delete
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this video? This action cannot be undone.

addRun.title: New translation run
addRun.description: Each language pair can only be created once (failed/cancelled can be recreated).
addRun.duplicateToast: Run already exists. Switched to the existing one.
addRun.failedToast: Failed to create. Please try again.
addRun.recreateHint: Previous run failed/cancelled. You can recreate it.

statusHint.pending: Queued. We'll start automatically - feel free to leave this page.
statusHint.processing: Processing in the background. You can close this page and come back later.
statusHint.completed: Done. Download the outputs, or open the editor to refine.
statusHint.failed: Failed. Check the error message and try again.

compareModal.title: Bilingual Compare
compareModal.description: {count} subtitle cues. Compare original vs translated, with preview and copy.

empty.title: No subtitles to compare
empty.description: This run has no subtitles yet, or there's nothing to compare.

toast.audioUnavailable: Audio unavailable. Please try again later.

ui.progressLoadFailed: Failed to load progress. Please try again later.
ui.progressEmptyFailed: No progress logs (the task may have failed to start).

summary.title: Task Summary
summary.descriptionDelivery: This language version is ready. You can keep refining it, preview outputs, and download the final assets.
summary.descriptionActive: The run is still moving in the background. Check progress first, then decide the next step.
summary.descriptionRecoverable: This run did not complete successfully. Review the cause first, then re-run the same language pair.
summary.errorFallback: No detailed error message is available right now. Re-running the translation is the safest next step.

actions.title: Core Actions
actions.deliveryDescription: Preview the result, jump into the editor for refinements, then export the final deliverables.
actions.activeTitle: Stay on top of this run
actions.activeDescription: The task is still processing. Check the progress review now, or prepare the next language version.
actions.recoverableDescription: Start by retrying the same language pair. If you already have other runs, switch and compare them.
actions.readySoonDescription: As soon as this run finishes, the final video, audio, and subtitle assets will appear here automatically.

deliverables.title: Asset Workspace
deliverables.description: Outputs are ready. Continue with editing, previewing, or downloading from each module.

progressReview.title: Progress Review
progressReview.descriptionDelivery: This run is complete. The process summary stays here so you can quickly confirm delivery status.
progressReview.descriptionActive: This section keeps reflecting task progress. You can leave the page and come back later.
progressReview.descriptionRecoverable: Use the status and error details here to decide whether to retry or switch to another run.

recovery.title: Recovery Guidance
recovery.description: Retry the same language pair first. If the issue persists, switch to another run and compare.

toast.downloadFailed: Download failed. Please try again later.
toast.audioFetchFailed: Failed to load audio. Please try again later.
toast.subtitleDownloadFailed: Failed to download subtitles. Please try again later.
toast.deleteFailedRetry: Delete failed. Please try again later.
